user.title: Schellenberg USB Stick
user.description: Select the USB stick from the list.

data_description.send_repeat:
Number of send repetitions per command. (default: 9)
Higher = more reliable.
Lower = faster

abort.no_serial_ports: No serial ports found. Make sure the USB stick is connected.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the USB stick.

options.yes: Yes, already set up (via remote or manual programming)
options.no: No, I will configure it first and restart the setup

options.yes: Yes, already paired with the USB stick

options.no: No, I will do it later

user.title: What would you like to add?
user.description:
**Roller Shutter**: Add and configure a single shutter with its own channel and calibration.

**All-Shutters Control**: Add a broadcast control that operates all paired shutters simultaneously on a shared channel.

**Remote Control**: Add a physical remote control. Assigns its buttons to shutters for position tracking — button presses are reflected in the shutter state.

setup_mode.title: Add Shutter
setup_mode.description:
Enter a name for this shutter.

Before continuing, make sure the motor's end positions and travel direction have been configured.

⚠️ Recommendation: disconnect all other shutter motors from power during pairing to avoid accidental pairings.

pairing_status.title: Channel & Pairing
pairing_status.description: Enter the 2-digit hex channel assigned to this shutter (e.g. 02, 0A, 1F, FF).

data.already_paired: Was it already paired with the USB stick?

pair_quick.title: Send Pairing Command
pair_quick.description:
Put the shutter motor into pairing mode (according to the user manual). Then click Submit to send the pairing command. Watch the shutter — it should respond with a beep or brief movement.

⚠️ Recommendation: disconnect all other shutter motors from power during pairing.

pair_confirm.title: Pairing Confirmation
pair_confirm.description: Did the shutter respond to the pairing command? (beep or brief movement)

channel.title: Shutter Setup
channel.description: Enter the 2-digit hex channel you want to assign to this shutter (e.g. 02, 0A, 1F, FF). Make sure the motor's end positions and travel direction have been configured.

pairing.title: Pairing Mode
pairing.description: Set the shutter to pairing mode by pressing the pairing button on the motor. Then enter the assigned channel (hex) and confirm.

calibration_prompt.title: Calibration
calibration_prompt.description: Travel times are required for accurate position tracking. Do you want to calibrate now?

calibration_intro.title: Calibration
calibration_intro.description:
The shutter will move automatically in both directions to measure the travel times.

**What will happen:**
- You choose the start direction (up or down)
- The shutter starts moving immediately after you click Submit
- When it reaches the end position, click Submit to stop and measure
- It then automatically moves in the opposite direction
- Click Submit again when it reaches that end position

Make sure the shutter is at one of the two end positions before continuing.

data.skip: Skip calibration (use 30 s default for both directions)

calibration_direction.title: Calibration — Choose Start Direction
calibration_direction.description: Select the direction the shutter should move first, then click Submit.

calibration_wait.title: Calibration — Moving {direction_arrow}
calibration_wait.description: The shutter is moving. Click Submit when it has fully reached the end position.

calibration_done.title: Calibration Complete
calibration_done.description:
Travel times have been saved successfully.

- Up: **{time_up} s**
- Down: **{time_down} s**

signal_select_shutters.title: Select Shutters
signal_select_shutters.description: Select the shutters you want to teach the remote for.

signal_wait.title: Press Button
signal_wait.description: Press any button on the remote for **{label}**, then click Submit to capture the signal.

signal_summary.title: Learned Signals

signal_all_prompt.title: ALL Commands
signal_all_prompt.description: Do you also want to learn an ALL command (for all shutters at once)?

reconfigure_menu.title: What would you like to change?

all_channel.title: All-Shutters Setup
all_channel.description:
Choose a name and assign a dedicated hex channel for this group (e.g. 02, 0A, 1F, FF). All shutters must be paired to this channel so they respond to the broadcast commands.

If you have already paired the shutters with this channel (e.g. in previous setup), select Yes below. Otherwise select No to start the pairing process now.

data.name: Name
data.already_paired: Are the selected shutters already paired with this channel?

pair_shutter.title: Pairing Shutter {current} of {total}
pair_shutter.description:
Ready to pair **{shutter_name}** with the All channel.

Click Submit to send the pairing command. The shutter should respond with a beep or brief movement.

pair_all.title: Pair with All-Channel
pair_all.description:
This will pair **{shutter_name}** with the All-channel group **{all_name}**.

Make sure the shutter motor is powered and within range, then click Submit.

pair_quick_reconf.title: Send Pairing Command
pair_quick_reconf.description:
Put the shutter motor into pairing mode (according to the user manual). Then click Submit to send the pairing command.

⚠️ Recommendation: disconnect all other shutter motors from power during pairing.

pairing_check.title: Pairing Required?
pairing_check.description: The channel has been changed. Does this shutter need to be re-paired with the USB stick on the new channel?

pair_confirm_reconf.title: Pairing Confirmation
pair_confirm_reconf.description: Did the shutter respond to the pairing command? (beep or brief movement)

remote_setup.title: Add Remote Control
remote_setup.description: Enter a name for this remote control.

remote_id_wait.title: Identify Remote
remote_id_wait.description: Press the **STOP** button on the remote, then click Submit. (STOP is recommended to avoid accidentally triggering any shutters)

remote_id_confirm.title: Remote Identified

remote_reconfigure_menu.title: What would you like to change?

error.invalid_channel: Invalid channel format. Enter a hexadecimal value (e.g. 0A).
error.channel_in_use: This channel is already assigned to another shutter. Choose a different channel.
error.no_direction_selected: Please select a direction or check 'Skip calibration'.
error.no_signal_received: No signal received. Press the button on the remote, then click Submit.
error.no_shutter_selected: Please select at least one shutter.
error.channel_reserved: This channel is reserved for physical remote controls and cannot be used for shutters.

abort.not_enough_shutters: At least 2 shutters must be configured before creating an All-Shutters entity.
abort.motor_not_configured: The motor must be configured before adding it here. Please follow the user manual, then try adding the shutter again.
abort.pairing_failed: The shutter did not respond. Make sure it is in pairing mode (see user manual), then try again.
abort.all_already_exists: An All-Shutters control already exists for this USB stick. Only one is allowed per device.
abort.pair_all_successful: Shutter successfully paired with the All-channel.
